title: trasus hostianus
side_effects: Trasus hostianus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach pain in some individuals, particularly when consumed in excessive amounts. In rare cases, it may also cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing, which require immediate medical attention. Prolonged or repeated misuse of the plant can lead to more severe health issues, such as liver damage and kidney problems. Furthermore, the unverified interactions between Trasus hostianus and other medications may exacerbate health complications, emphasizing the importance of proper guidance and caution when using this plant.
